name: HTS_WORK_PATTERN_SHIFTS
description: Table to store the work pattern shift information.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique system generated identifier for a work pattern shift.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code entered when creating a work pattern shift, in order to help user identify the work pattern shift.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the work pattern to which this shift pertains.

columns.Name: DAY_INDEX
columns.Comments: Day of the work pattern to which this shift is associated.

columns.Name: SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the shift from shifts library associated to the work pattern.

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Offset from midnight. Defines the start time of the work pattern shift in minutes.

columns.Name: END_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Offset from midnight. Defines the end time of the work pattern shift in minutes.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of the shift in minutes.

columns.Name: BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Unpaid break duration of the shift.

columns.Name: PAID_BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Paid break duration of the shift.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
